name: Shield
effect: +1 Defence

name: Light Armour
effect: Standard protection. +1 Def

name: Heavy Armour
effect: +2 Defence, -1 Movement

name: Mount
effect: 10 Movement, +4 Wounds

name: Iron Banner
effect: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Defence characteristic of visible friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.

name: Ensnaring Net
effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, that enemy fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

name: Fanged Buckler
effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.

name: Healing Potion
effect: Remove 3 damage points. This item is destroyed after use.

name: Swiftwind Dust
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to this Fighter's move characteristic for the remainder of the game.

name: Silkstrider Webbing
effect: This fighter does not suffer impact damage from falls.

name: Skin of Flame-Ale
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to this Figther's Weapon Skill characteristic for the remainder of the game.

name: Jar of Chamonic Glowflies
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to the value of abilities used by this Fighter for the remainder of the game.

name: Carvolax-scale Anklet
effect: Add 1 to the move characteristic of this Fighter.

name: Chronomantic Dial
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to the Attacks value of Melee weapons carried by this fighter for the remainder of the turn.

name: Ironoak Seed
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to this Figther's Defence characteristic for the remainder of the game.

name: Greater Healing Potion
effect: Remove 6 damage points. This item is destroyed after use.

name: Godbeast Idol
effect: Add 1 to the value of abilities (to a maximum of 6) used by this Fighter.

name: Vial of Jabberslythe Blood
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to critical hits for melee attacks made by this fighter this activaiton.

name: Ur-Gold Sigil
effect: Increase this Fighter's Defence by 1.

name: Blight Serpent Venom
effect: Add 1 to the Weapon Skill of this Fighter.

name: Bauble of Shadows
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to gain the Fly trait for the remainder of the turn.

name: Flask of Aqua Ghyranis
effect: Remove 10 damage points. This item is destroyed after use.

name: Pendant of Bloodglass
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to the Attacks value of Ranged weapons carried by this fighter for the remainder of the turn.

name: Raven-Feather Necklace
effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to critical hits for Ranged attacks made by this fighter this activation.

name: Rune-Etched Vambraces
effect: Reaction. After dice have been rolled but before damage applied, a Fighter may destroy this item to reduce the damage of each hit and crit by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

name: Harrying Raven
effect: Pick an enemy fighter within 20" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make disengage actions.
